title: Walk, wag and win at fundraiser for animals in need
description: GEORGE NEWS - A tail-wagging good time...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A tail-wagging good time awaits animal lovers at the upcoming wag-a-thon, a 5km charity walk to support Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need (Odin).


> The event will take place tomorrow, Saturday 24 May, at Cornerstone Lifestyle Village, with registration opening at 08:00 and the walk kicking off at 09:00.


With an entry fee of just R50, participants will not only enjoy a scenic walk but also contribute to a vital cause.

The event promises a day full of excitement, featuring raffle prizes, live entertainment, and a bar and food stalls for all to enjoy.

ODIN, a well-known animal welfare organisation, is appealing for sponsors for raffle prizes, as well as businesses looking to advertise or offer hands-on help during the event.

For more information or to get involved, contact the organisers at 061 531 7504.

Come walk, wag, and make a difference.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
